programme.title: Hearing
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at hearing, and show you an experiment to see a sound wave in action!

programme.title: Matching Socks
programme.desc: In this episode we explain the concept of 'probability'. How can we weigh all our possibilities to eventually pick the most likely outcome? In order to illustrate our options, Eric rearranges his messy sock drawer – blindfolded.

programme.title: The Danish Elephant
programme.desc: This episode demonstrates how following a specific sequence of arithmetic steps, combined with the special properties of number 9, will always result in the same answer. Amaze your friends with your mind-reading super skills!

programme.title: How Tall is a Tree?
programme.desc: How can we figure out the height of tall objects such as a tree or a basketball net without using a ladder? In this episode we learn how indirect measurements, proportions, and estimation can be used to compute linear measures with surprising accuracy.

programme.title: Spring into Action
programme.desc: Inspired by a sleepover at a friend's place, Darwin and Newts build a trampoline prototype before building a larger trampoline.

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Searching for White Eye
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers search for a legendary cheetah called White Eye in the Mountain Zebra National Park in South Africa. Along the way they spot zebras, buffalos, springboks and vervet monkeys.

programme.title: The Big Old Kauri
programme.desc: Darwin, Newts and Heni work together to protect the big old kauri and keep it healthy.

programme.title: The President (F.W. de Klerk) and The Pioneer (Valerie Amos)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, former President of South Africa and Nobel Peace Prize winner President F.W. de Klerk and first Black woman member of the British Government and pioneering British diplomat Valerie Amos share their life lessons.

programme.title: A Twister Tale
programme.desc: Could a tornado really pick up a house? To find out, the team calls up Mundi's friend Luke, who's a storm-chaser. When the call ends abruptly, Doki declares a rescue expedition! The team flies to a weather station near Oklahoma City, Oklahoma to make sure Luke is okay.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Myths and Legends
programme.desc: After taking care of his daily chores, Howler ‘gets away from it all' by daydreaming about wonderful encounters! In the process, he takes us through various contemporary beliefs, myths and legends, powered by his very rich imagination.

programme.title: Trip to Mali
programme.desc: Milo is trying to learn his poem but is having a hard time remembering the words. Alim thinks it is easier to learn something while listening to music! Zoe and Milo do not seem convinced, and Alim decides that only a short break to Mali could change this.

programme.title: Croatia
programme.desc: Croatia adventure: Plitvice National Park and Bisevo exploration, European Eagle Owl encounter with local teens, rock climbing at Paklenica National Park, and a taste of Croatian folk music. A week of diverse escapades with Nicole in the incredible country of Croatia!

programme.title: Here Be Dragons
programme.desc: A dragon-hunting expedition leads Ant to find an ancient scroll that holds clues to an amazing mystery.

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: Spectroscopes and Light
programme.desc: What do atmospheric particles do in the sky? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of radiation. Have hands-on fun by creating a weather system in a jar, and get to know C.V. Raman, a physicist, who discovered that scattered light can change wavelength.

programme.title: A Twister Tale
programme.desc: Could a tornado really pick up a house? To find out, the team calls up Mundi's friend Luke, who's a storm-chaser. When the call ends abruptly, Doki declares a rescue expedition! The team flies to a weather station near Oklahoma City, Oklahoma to make sure Luke is okay.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries of the Solar System
programme.desc: Even though spacecraft have been sent to every planet in our solar system, many mysteries remain. Host Emily Calandrelli searches for answers to celestial mysteries that stump even our brightest scientists.

programme.title: Quitting's Not An Option
programme.desc: Artistic gymnast Madi has not had luck on her side as she has recently suffered an injury. Thankfully, she is now back to full fitness and is off to her grading competition to see if she can pass the tests and qualify as an elite gymnast.

programme.title: The Big Mystery
programme.desc: Today poor Sprout, the bunny, has painful gnashers, and the Junior Vets are here to help. There is a big mystery at the aquarium – why is Lucy, the sea lion, putting on so much weight? And the punky monkeys need vital nutrition.

programme.title: A.I.M.Y
programme.desc: A new artificial intelligence program running the submarine stops the Nektons from saving a kayaker. Can Ant outwit it and save the day?

programme.title: E8 - Deal or No Deal?
programme.desc: Tension boils over between Claudia, Robin and Josh as they make a last-ditch attempt to close a deal with a buyer from Vietnam.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Scientists from the University of Queensland come to the farm to practice artificial insemination techniques. Lyn tells the other students her heart-breaking secret and says she is considering a future in the crocodile industry. John reveals which two students are going to Kakadu.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: John takes Lyn and Luke to Kakadu where they raid nests and catch a four and a half metre male croc for research. Lyn returns to the place where her 11-year old granddaughter was taken by a croc and is finally at peace.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.title: E11 - The Pet Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a scruffelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.

programme.title: E12 - The Lost Property Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.title: E13 - The Mountain Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels need to rescue Enid when they see her at the top of the Mighty Sugar Bun Mountain.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E3 - Annabel's Austrian Kaiserschmarren
programme.desc: Annabel is making a dessert called Kaiserschmarren served with blueberries and raspberries. Annabel wears a traditional dress and invites her friends to her Austrian chalet.

programme.title: E27 - Seesaw
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: E5 - I'm Hungry
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: E94 - Day Trip
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a day trip to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on The Tubby Bouncy, The Tubby Slidey and The Tubby Spinny before they go on The Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: E11 - The Pet Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a scruffelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.

programme.title: E12 - The Lost Property Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels lose Tag in the Clubhouse but to find him they're going to have to figure out where the Lost Property room is.

programme.title: E13 - The Mountain Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels need to rescue Enid when they see her at the top of the Mighty Sugar Bun Mountain.

programme.title: E14 - Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: E3 - Annabel's Austrian Kaiserschmarren
programme.desc: Annabel is making a dessert called Kaiserschmarren served with blueberries and raspberries. Annabel wears a traditional dress and invites her friends to her Austrian chalet.

programme.title: E27 - Seesaw
programme.desc: Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help move him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: E5 - Chicken
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'chicken' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of chickens - a brown chicken, a white chicken, a clucking chicken and some friendly chickens.

programme.title: E15 - Full Of Beans
programme.desc: Everyone in OKIDO is feeling very tired. Messy tries to help by adding extra superbeans to Farmer Fuddle's new recipe, but now everyone has far too much energy! How can Messy help them burn it off?

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E47 - Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey needs her Mum's advice on dealing with a troublesome neighbour, when the serenity of her couch cushion playhouse is threatened by Bingo's own growing stable of animals.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E23 - The Theatre Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.title: E33 - The Sphinx, Egypt
programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: E32 - Everglades National Park, Florida
programme.desc: The Go Jetters save the Florida Everglades when hungry alligators chase Glitch's picnic.

programme.title: E18 - Duck's Quack
programme.desc: Sarah suggests visiting the spare sounds section of the Big Shop when Duck loses his quack.

programme.title: E50 - The Key Badge
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error.

programme.title: E2 - Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: E12 - Cauliflower
programme.desc: It's Cauliflower creaking away as she grows and sings her catchy 'Cauliflower Creak' song.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E23 - The Theatre Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels help to put on an amateur dramatic show.

programme.desc: Glitch and the Grimbots are on holiday in Egypt where the Grimbots bury the Great Sphinx in sand, leaving only its head showing.

programme.title: E1 - Into the Heat
programme.desc: Meet the unlikely collaborators working to ensure mutual survival in the Kalahari Basin. Learn of an elephant clan’s symbiotic link to fruiting anaboom trees, a meerkat’s alliance with a feisty drongo bird, and more flora-and-fauna odd couples.

programme.title: E1 - Arid Heart
programme.desc: From the vast, dry plains of the interior come some of Australia’s most recognized imagery, such as the monolithic red rock of Uluru and the bounding red kangaroo. But how did the arid center of the continent come to be?

programme.title: E2 - The Great Divide
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces and spanning 3,700 km along the eastern edge of Australia, the Great Dividing Range separates two very different worlds. Aerial footage and intimate studies reveal how species survive and thrive in this mountain home.

programme.title: E1 - Into the Heat
programme.desc: Meet the unlikely collaborators working to ensure mutual survival in the Kalahari Basin. Learn of an elephant clan’s symbiotic link to fruiting anaboom trees, a meerkat’s alliance with a feisty drongo bird, and more flora-and-fauna odd couples.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E1 - Meet the Jaguars
programme.desc: Head out into the Pantanal with Lizzie and the Onçafari team on the hunt for a missing dominant male jaguar. Monitor the battle between young hopefuls, like outsider Badalo, who want to usurp his power and win over Fera and the other local females.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E1 - Into the Heat
programme.desc: Meet the unlikely collaborators working to ensure mutual survival in the Kalahari Basin. Learn of an elephant clan’s symbiotic link to fruiting anaboom trees, a meerkat’s alliance with a feisty drongo bird, and more flora-and-fauna odd couples.

programme.title: E1 - Arid Heart
programme.desc: From the vast, dry plains of the interior come some of Australia’s most recognized imagery, such as the monolithic red rock of Uluru and the bounding red kangaroo. But how did the arid center of the continent come to be?

programme.title: E2 - The Great Divide
programme.desc: Created by titanic forces and spanning 3,700 km along the eastern edge of Australia, the Great Dividing Range separates two very different worlds. Aerial footage and intimate studies reveal how species survive and thrive in this mountain home.

programme.title: E1 - Into the Heat
programme.desc: Meet the unlikely collaborators working to ensure mutual survival in the Kalahari Basin. Learn of an elephant clan’s symbiotic link to fruiting anaboom trees, a meerkat’s alliance with a feisty drongo bird, and more flora-and-fauna odd couples.

programme.title: E5 - Grasslands
programme.desc: Explore one of Earth’s most vital but overlooked habitats and learn how grasslands could slow climate change by soaking up more carbon than forests do. Meet key species, such as bison and pumas, that could restore this resource and heal our planet.

programme.title: E1 - Meet the Jaguars
programme.desc: Head out into the Pantanal with Lizzie and the Onçafari team on the hunt for a missing dominant male jaguar. Monitor the battle between young hopefuls, like outsider Badalo, who want to usurp his power and win over Fera and the other local females.

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Witness the ultimate battle for dominance as scientists try to pick out the alpha male in a pack of 100-plus great white sharks off the New Zealand coast. Marvel at the speed, hunting prowess, and fearlessness that determine the leader of the pack.

E2 - Twinkle Twinkle Little Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - Fruits, Cupcakes, Snacks & Ice Cream!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy adventures with fruits, cupcakes, snacks & ice cream! Pogo wants to pick a delicious fruit from a tree, but he hilariously learns that he has to be patient & wait for it to ripen! Then, Lulu is determined to bake a cupcake all by herself, but her mixture turns into a giant cupcake blob that takes over the Playpod! Plus, Fuse is craving a snack but can't get the box open & Pogo's ice cream keeps melting!

programme.title: E1 - A Barnyard Boogie with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready for a barnyard boogie with JJ & his friends! The dance party kicks off on the farm with a fun rendition of the 'Yes, Yes Vegetable Song,' where all the animals come to dance. Then, it's time to wake up the little bunny friends with a merry tune & hop, march & skip around! Join the fun as the kids sing 'Old Macdonald,' ride a little green tractor to find their animal pals & search for five little ducks all over the farm. It's a day full of singing, dancing & farm fun!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Test of Skill & Teamwork!
programme.desc: Gecko & the Mechanicals face a big test of skill & teamwork! First, the Mechs are in Garage School when a real emergency comes in. In a role reversal, they must fix Fiona the Firetruck's starter motor while Gecko instructs them! Then, when Blue crashes during a flying race, Gecko must show his skill to repair him. The day ends with a big American football game where Gecko comes up with a clever strategy & a creative fix to help his team win!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E2 - Let's All Help Each Other!
programme.desc: It's a day of helping each other at Lellobee City Farm! When a mama songbird's eggs are about to hatch, Mei, Ella & Rishi build her a beautiful bird feeding table so she can take care of her new chicks. Then, when Heidi the Horse is feeling down in the dumps, Ella & all the friends put on a show & give her a big group hug to make her feel happy again! The helping continues as everyone learns the importance of sharing their veggies with a visiting gopher.

programme.title: E620 - Pups Save A Roo

programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: Hope After Loss
programme.desc: Nothing prepares us for the devastating loss of a loved one. The grief is overwhelming. And it doesn't go away quickly. Some say it never will. But sometimes women successfully turn their grief into action. They do something meaningful that not only transforms their own lives, but possibly the lives of many others.

programme.title: Songs For Everyone
programme.desc: A song program where children can sing along by reading the lyrics on the screen.

programme.title: Ninja Art Of Heart, Popomaru!
programme.desc: A fun ninja drama where parents and children can explore emotional growth together! The story follows Shinobi, an elementary school ninja, as she teams up with Popomaru -- the playful spirit of emotions -- to learn a creative way of understanding feelings and building positive relationships with those around her. Join her on an exciting journey to discover how to handle emotions with skill and joy!

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: Tasked with swaying Azai retainer Miyabe Keijun (Donpei), Tokichiro is confronted with an impossible demand: a child to be taken hostage. Childless himself, he attempts to offer the child of Tomo (Miyazawa Emma), only to provoke her fury and be forced to turn to Koichiro instead. Meanwhile, the defeated Azai Nagamasa and Asakura Yoshikage (Tsurumi Shingo) seek refuge at Enryakuji Temple, leading Oda Nobunaga to order the temple's destruction if it refused to submit.

programme.title: Hello! NHK World-Japan

programme.title: Project X: The Challengers-New Beginnings 'Roasted Sweet Potato'
programme.desc: Project X returns for the first time in 18 years. The former series featured people involved in project related to the Japanese industry and contemporary history. The new series focuses on people in the “Lost Era” following the collapse of the bubble economy. In every era, there are always those take on challenges. Even without receiving praise or being in the spotlight, some dedicate themselves to their work. The documentary delivers passion and courage right to you.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: A young reporter named Yoneko (Furukawa Kotone) visits Rosanjin (Fuji Tatsuya) in his later years, a towering figure in Japanese culinary and artistic aesthetics. Though bewildered by his imperious and self-centered behavior, she continues to call on him to take dictation for his memoir. As she witnesses his interactions with distinguished figures-including Yoshida Shigeru, Noguchi Isamu, and John D. Rockefeller III-Yoneko slowly begins to understand the real Rosanjin: a man who, for all his sharp words, regards cuisine as a form of art and pursues it with unwavering, uncompromising dedication.

programme.title: Ninja Art Of Heart, Popomaru!

programme.title: E8 - Car, Fridge, Can: Where Does Our Steel Come From?
programme.desc: How is French steel made? Hugo Clement investigates the heart of the heavy industry and reveals its little secrets. programme.title: E27
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: E12 - From The Norman Bocage To The Inner Suburbs
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde immerses herself in the rural Norman atmospheres before exploring the Parisian suburbs in search of tastefully renovated houses.

programme.title: E8 - Car, Fridge, Can: Where Does Our Steel Come From?
programme.desc: How is French steel made? Hugo Clement investigates the heart of the heavy industry and reveals its little secrets. An opportunity to discover that a quarter of the greenhouse gas emissions from the French industry is linked to steel production and that this metal is recycled abroad.

programme.desc: Why has the fly become an insect that everyone detests, so much so that humans have even created a fly whisk to fight it?

programme.desc: In each episode, an animal from the African continent is highlighted in song.

programme.title: E12 - In Paris, With Marc Lavoine
programme.desc: Mory Sacko is at the Hotel de la Marine, in Paris, with singer Marc Lavoine. On today's menu: pineapple chicken.

programme.title: E6 - Ready-To-Wear Fashion Shows/Ai In Fashion/Le Chemin Des Maquettes
programme.desc: A look back at the ready-to-wear shows for Autumn-Winter 2025-2026 from Mossi Traore to Paco Rabanne and Enfants Riches Deprimes. AI is making its mark in fashion as stylists, art directors and clothing designers. Le Chemin des Maquettes makes metal fashion pieces for some of the world's top designers.

programme.title: E4 - All The Flavour Of Quebec
programme.desc: Exploring the city of Quebec, all the way to the Saguenay Fjords National Park, in deep mid-winter then in autumn as the forest dons its most vibrant colours. With historian and photographer Pierre Lahoud, we fly over the icebound Saint Lawrence, one of the world's most dangerous navigable waterways.

programme.title: E4 - Fusion, Glass By Valerie/Truffle Caver
programme.desc: We discover the fascinating world of blowing glass through a tube, with Valerie de Roquemaurel, the only Swiss woman to practice the art. Then dive into the world of the truffle in the northern Vaud with local enthusiasts, the truffle ''cavers''.

programme.title: E91
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E1 - In Bergerac (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Bergerac, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the region's cultural and gastronomic heritage.

E22 - Guano In 60 Seconds
programme.desc: Charles Darwin Middle School becomes condemned because of bat guano, and all the classes get moved into a portable.

programme.title: E2 - I Got A New Aptitude
programme.desc: When everyone at school takes a test to show what their future careers might be, Jake and Adam are disappointed in the results.

programme.title: E13 - Popular Banana Split
programme.desc: Hedgehog and Max discover a tiny high school when they are accidentally shrunk by a science experiment.

programme.title: E14 - Oscar And Hedgehog's Melody
programme.desc: Susie holds the annual talent show that has the rest of the campers competing to win.

programme.title: E12 - Kentucky Farewell
programme.desc: All season the chefs have been growing gardens at their Kentucky estate. Tom ambushes the sleeping chefs and challenges them to reap what they sowed and make a dish focused on their garden harvest. Then, for the last elimination challenge in Kentucky, the chefs head to Keeneland, a thoroughbred horse auction house, to bid on luxury ingredients for dishes to show gratitude to their culinary mentors. Chefs Bryan Voltaggio, Gavin Kaysen, JD Fratzke, Kim Alter, David Posey and Chris Coombs join the judges to see how far the Chefs have come and who deserves to go to Macau for the finals.

programme.desc: When Pizza Steve borrows Uncle Grandpa's sunglasses, he sees things in a whole new light.

programme.desc: Oscar finds a mysterious old video game in the library.

E2
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: E322
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: DP World Tour 25/26 Volvo China Open -Day 4
DP World Tour 25/26 Volvo China Open -Day 4
The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: It was 1917, China. CHENG was an innocent young man who worked in a grocery store and had no ambition, other than to be with his lovely neighbour, the Peking Opera student QIU. But a fateful night had changed Cheng's life forever, as he literally walked right in the affair between his lady boss and the chief of police. To hide this secret, the chief decided to throw Cheng into prison, accusing him of raping his lady boss. Desolated, Cheng met a cellmate MAO, who happened to have an escape plan. The duo broke out, and Cheng had no choice but to leave his life, and his dream girl behind...

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: The Island
programme.desc: The story takes place on a deserted island. The only residence on the island is a family in which the mother ruled over three of her sons: Tai Fat, gloomy and sullen; Yee Fat, vulgar and cruel; Sam Fat, slightly retarded. Mother's earnest wish is to find a wife for Sam Fat to continue the family tree. Teacher Cheung, along with six of his students arrive on the island for camping. They first meet Yee Fat who brings them to the grocery for a rest. Yee Fat is delighted with the presence of the 3 young girls while Sam Fat falls in love at first sight with the charming girl Phyllis. He expresses his feelings to Tai Fat who has sworn to his mother that he will fulfill her wish to find his youngest brother a wife. He proposes to Cheung that Phyllis be married to Sam Fat. Cheung first thinks that it's a joke, but soon senses that Tai Fat is serious and that all three brothers are actually psychologically imbalanced...

programme.title: The Heroic Trio
programme.desc: The evil minions of an ancient eunuch are stealing baby boys from their hospital cribs. The only hope to save the city is in the hands of The Heroic Trio.

programme.title: Plain Jane To The Rescue
programme.desc: Jenny, with the plain looks but a heart of gold, she is always in between jobs. Once she gets a job, her knack of creating awkward situations immediately loses it for her. Fang is her suitor, but he gets nowhere as the girl has no time for love, so Fang goes along with her in job hunting. A big group called Sanda wants to take over the whole city through take-over deals. They are ruthless and have thrown thousands into the streets. Jenny and Fang, bungling as they are, become the vanguard of a movement against the great conglomerate. They were even being hunted by the group and their life was threatened...

programme.title: Dr. Wai In 'The Scripture With No Words'
programme.desc: “The Scripture With No Words” had been lost for a long time. Everybody was eager to find it, even the ambitious Japanese. Dr. Wai was antiquarian. Having seen the mysterious “Wooden Horse”, lost control and killing people, he quit his job. However, being supported by his friend, Dr. Wai recovered and resumed to his work. He went to Shanghai trying to locate “The Scripture With No Words” and he discovered that it was in the possession of the leader of “Gang of Salt”. And the game begin...

programme.desc: The show highlights the personal journeys, challenges and truimphs of ordinary and extraordinary overseas Filipinos. Produced and hosted by Rose Eclarinal

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。
